topic: Footsteps cross my ceiling every night, though I live on the top floor.
title: Footsteps Above The Top Floor | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Footsteps crossed my ceiling each night, though no floor exists above.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph looking up at a cracked bedroom ceiling at night, faint lamp glow below, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My flat sits on the very top floor of the building.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a tall apartment building exterior at night, top windows lit, dim sky, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Above me there is only roof and cold sky.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a flat rooftop under a grey overcast night, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first night, slow steps moved from wall to wall.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a dim ceiling corner with a hairline crack, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I held my breath and counted them. Thirteen steps.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an open mouthed pillow and tangled sheets in a dark room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I climbed to the roof and found only gravel.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an empty gravel rooftop at night, a single vent pipe, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: No hatch, no access, no way for anyone up there.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a sealed roof access panel painted shut, dim corridor light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yet the steps returned, the same path, the same count.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a ceiling seen from below with faint dust trickling down, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then they slowed and stopped directly above my bed.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a ceiling directly over a bed, single faint stain spreading, dim lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Something knelt up there, and the plaster gently sagged.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a slightly bowed ceiling panel above a bed, hairline cracks, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I moved my bed to the corner the next day.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a bed pushed into a room corner, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now the footsteps cross to the corner each night too.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a shadowed ceiling corner above a bed, faint flaking plaster, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
